Date_Range: This column represents the date range during which the heatmap data was collected. It provides the timeframe for the traffic flow analysis.
Top_Traffic_Zones: This column lists the top five traffic flow zones within the bakery section. These are the areas where the highest customer traffic was observed.
Store_Location: This column represents the store location within the U.S. It provides geographical context to the traffic flow data.
